last_cycle.summary: Q173 v2: Decoder cross-attn L*=L3 (L*/D=0.600), encoder L*=L4 (L*/D=0.800), ratio_gap=0.200. Fixed v1 mock bug (random-peak averaging). Content sensitivity Δ=+0.123 at L3 (tightens). Dual-L* story: enc L4→dec CA L3→text.
